next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/postiz-a.json from query --live ct_ip.
Open access_url from deploy/query output and complete first-run registration in the web UI.
Optional: add BIND A record and nginx-waf sites[] when using a public HTTPS URL; set postiz.public_url in config.json then run maintain --rebuild.
Social provider keys in postiz.env_extra require maintain --rebuild (NEXT_PUBLIC_* baked at build time).
Community helper script marks Postiz as in active development — pin postiz.version after validating upgrades.
